8X.name: 8X
8X.notesHtml:
Overnight Break of Journey is permitted under this restriction code, but the restriction applies to all individual legs of the journey at each intermediate station:

Outward (on day 2): Outward restrictions as above apply from the intermediate station, Monday-Friday.

Return: Return restrictions as above apply from the intermediate station, Monday-Friday.
8X.notesText:
Overnight Break of Journey is permitted under this restriction code, but the restriction applies to all individual legs of the journey at each intermediate station:
 Outward (on day 2):  Outward restrictions as above apply from the intermediate station, Monday-Friday.
 Return:  Return restrictions as above apply from the intermediate station, Monday-Friday.
8X.seasonalVariationsHtml:
This restriction is lifted over Christmas and other Bank Holidays:

22 December 2025-2 January 2026, 03 April 2026, 06 April 2026, 4 May 2026, 25 May 2026 and 31 August 2026.

9A.name: 9A
9A.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays
9A.seasonalVariationsHtml:
School Holidays - Evening peak restrictions on outward journeys from London Liverpool Street and Stratford (London) (which only apply to Ipswich and beyond) and from Liverpool Street and Tottenham Hale (which only apply to Brandon and beyond via Cambridge) are lifted during school holidays and half-term weeks. Note that restrictions from London Kings Cross are not affected and remain in place.

2024

Summer: Monday 22 July to Tuesday 3 September

Autumn Half-Term: Friday 25 October to Friday 1 November

Christmas and New Year: Monday 23 December to Friday 3 January 2025.

2025

Half-Term: Monday 17 to Friday 21 February

Easter: Monday 7 to Tuesday 22 April (Friday 18 and Monday 21 April are public holidays)

Half-Term: Tuesday 27 to Friday 30 May (Monday 26 May is a public holiday)

Summer: Starts 23 July.

All dates are inclusive and are taken from the Norfolk County Council website.
9A.seasonalVariationsText:
School Holidays - Evening peak restrictions on outward journeys from London Liverpool Street and Stratford (London) (which only apply to Ipswich and beyond) and from Liverpool Street and Tottenham Hale (which only apply to Brandon and beyond via Cambridge) are lifted during school holidays and half-term weeks. Note that restrictions from London Kings Cross are not affected and remain in place.
 2024
 Summer: Monday 22 July to Tuesday 3 September
Autumn Half-Term: Friday 25 October to Friday 1 November
Christmas and New Year: Monday 23 December to Friday 3 January 2025.
 2025
 Half-Term: Monday 17 to Friday 21 February
Easter: Monday 7 to Tuesday 22 April (Friday 18 and Monday 21 April are public holidays)
Half-Term: Tuesday 27 to Friday 30 May (Monday 26 May is a public holiday)
Summer: Starts 23 July.
 All dates are inclusive and are taken from the Norfolk County Council website.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Valid on trains timed to depart:

  • LondonEuston before 04:30 and after 09:25; and before 15:01 and after 18:44, excepting Fridays;
  • LondonFenchurch Street before 04:30 and after 09:29;
  • London Kings Cross before 04:30 and after 09:29 and before 16:29 and after 18:34;
  • London Liverpool Street before 04:30 and after 09:29 and, to Ipswich and beyond, also to Brandon and beyond via Cambridge, before 16:29 and after 18:34.
  • Kensington Olympia before 04:30 and after 09:09; or before 15:36 and after 18:12, excepting Fridays;
  • Stratford(London) before 04:30 and after 09:29 and, to Ipswich and beyond, also to Brandon and beyond via Cambridge before 16:37 and after 18:41.
  • Tottenham Hale before 04:30 and after 09:29, and, to Brandon and beyond via Cambridge, before 16:42 and after 18:45.
restrictions.returnHtml:
valid on trains timed to arrive:

  • LondonEuston before 05:00 and after 11:11, except Fridays;

  • London Kings Cross after 09:59;
  • London Liverpool Street after 09:59;
  • Kensington Olympia after 10:59, except Fridays;
  • Stratford (London) after 09:45;
  • Tottenham Hale after 09:49.

9D.name: 9D
9D.notesHtml:
Break of journey is permitted. For long-haul train journeys, if a customer begins their journey at such a time that the timetable does not facilitate completion of the journey into their destination, customers may break their journey overnight. The same time restrictions apply for any continuation of travel on day 2 in this scenario.

Customers must not travel on CrossCountry services before 09:30.

Valid on Caledonian Sleeper services (with supplement).
9D.notesText:
Break of journey is permitted. For long-haul train journeys, if a customer begins their journey at such a time that the timetable does not facilitate completion of the journey into their destination, customers may break their journey overnight. The same time restrictions apply for any continuation of travel on day 2 in this scenario.
 Customers must not travel on CrossCountry services before 09:30.
 Valid on Caledonian Sleeper services (with supplement).
9D.seasonalVariationsHtml:
Restrictions will be lifted for trains departing from and arriving at London Kings Cross and Stevenage on a Friday until further notice.

Restrictions will be eased on Monday 24th August 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased between 21st December 2026 and 1st January 2027 in both directions.

Evening restrictions will be lifted for trains departing London Kings Cross and Stevenage on Thursday 2nd April 2026 due to the Easter Bank Holiday weekend. Restrictions will be eased between Friday 3rd April 2026 and Monday 6th April 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased on Monday 4th May 2026 and 25th May 2026 in both directions.

Generally, Friday evening restriction easements apply on a Thursday before any Friday that is a Bank Holiday where travelling north from London Kings Cross or Stevenage.

 Restrictions will be eased on Monday 4th May 2026 and 25th May 2026 in both directions.
 Generally, Friday evening restriction easements apply on a Thursday before any Friday that is a Bank Holiday where travelling north from London Kings Cross or Stevenage.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
For journeys to the following stations there is no time restriction:

  • any station in Scotland, except Lockerbie, Kirkconnel, Dumfries, Annan, Gretna Green and Sanquhar;
  • Flint, Shotton, Prestatyn and beyond;
  • beyond Shrewsbury.

For journeys to any other station, not valid on any train timed to depart from Milton Keynes Central after 02:29 until 09:46, except the 08:54 West Midlands Trains service.
restrictions.returnHtml:
For journeys from the following stations there is no time restriction:

  • any station in Scotland, except Lockerbie, Kirkconnel, Dumfries, Annan, Gretna Green and Sanquhar;
  • Flint, Shotton, Prestatyn and beyond;
  • beyond Shrewsbury.

For journeys from any other station, see restriction code 9A.
